_comment: Tenants of Record — the deed copy from Old Dengs coat (entrusted after the supper delivery, tag has_firstfurrow_deed). The scrubbing artifact the audience reads instantly: four family names on the holder line, a re-verification stamp across the LAST of them (the erasure targets the FAMILY, never the founder — canon-clean). Keepsake, not a hand-in: per orchestrator wiring the Lucian records-fee beat belongs to the EXISTING transition_filed entry (Transition Order 7-A), so this book has no turn-in and never leaves the player. No wheat/grain words. written_book_content is exempt from the quote bans.
